dhalsim-stand-light-punch.name: Standing Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled

dhalsim-stand-medium-punch.name: Standing Medium Punch
dhalsim-stand-medium-punch.notes_sc: Long range poke; extends hurtbox 1f before active so it can be counterpoked

dhalsim-stand-heavy-punch.name: Standing Heavy Punch
notes: Forces a juggle state on Punish Counter
dhalsim-stand-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Long range poke; extended hurtbox lingers for the first 16 recovery frames (slightly retracts on 12-16f of recovery), making it easily whiff punished even at max range

dhalsim-stand-light-kick.name: Standing Light Kick
dhalsim-stand-light-kick.notes_sc: Extremely long range for a light normal, but has startup similar to a medium poke; DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

dhalsim-stand-medium-kick.name: Standing Medium Kick
dhalsim-stand-medium-kick.notes_sc: Long range poke; extends hurtbox 1f before active so it can be counterpoked

dhalsim-stand-heavy-kick.name: Standing Heavy Kick
notes: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent
Adds 24 frames of advantage on Punish Counter
dhalsim-stand-heavy-kick.notes_sc: Only the closest hitbox can hit crouching opponents; mid-range hitbox whiffs on crouching opponents unless they extend a vertical hurtbox; the 2 farthest hitboxes whiff on all crouching opponents (even with an extended vertical hurtbox); extremely long range cancelable poke and anti-air; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; stagger on Punish Counter can combo into 5HP at most ranges, or can confirm into Drive Rush for stronger punishes; leg has an extended hurtbox 2f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles, and 1f before active that can be counterpoked; tip of Dhalsim's foot hurtbox is anti-air invincible on frames 16-23; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd recovery frame

dhalsim-crouch-light-punch.name: Crouching Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled

dhalsim-crouch-medium-punch.name: Crouching Medium Punch
dhalsim-crouch-medium-punch.notes_sc: Long range cancelable poke; extends hurtbox 1f before active so it can be counterpoked

dhalsim-crouch-heavy-punch.name: Crouching Heavy Punch
dhalsim-crouch-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Low Profile 11-46f (until recovery); can be used to punish projectiles from long range; 4f extra recovery on whiff and Perfect Parry

dhalsim-crouch-light-kick.name: Crouching Light Kick
dhalsim-crouch-light-kick.notes_sc: Short range slide; semi-low profile 2-26f (until recovery)

dhalsim-crouch-medium-kick.name: Crouching Medium Kick
dhalsim-crouch-medium-kick.notes_sc: Medium range slide; semi-low profile 10-30f; can lead to follow-up combos or pressure if well spaced; opponent has a different reeling animation when spaced to be +4 or better on hit

dhalsim-crouch-heavy-kick.name: Crouching Heavy Kick
notes: Knockdown time extended when attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter

dhalsim-jump-light-punch.name: Jumping Light Punch
dhalsim-jump-light-punch.notes_sc: Can be used as a fuzzy instant overhead vs. JP/Marisa/Zangief only

dhalsim-jump-medium-punch.name: Jumping Medium Punch
dhalsim-jump-medium-punch.notes_sc: Cancelable into Float, Air Teleport, Yoga Comet, Drill Kick, or Yoga Mummy; great horizontal range for use as an air-to-air; does not hit overhead and cannot hit crouching opponents unless they extend a vertical hurtbox; lower body projectile invuln 9-25f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs); when juggled into, puts opponent into a limited juggle state (has a higher Juggle Increase value mid-juggle); can be comboed into after OD Yoga Flame (then canceled into Yoga Mummy to keep the opponent juggled)

dhalsim-jump-heavy-punch.name: Jumping Heavy Punch
notes: Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent
dhalsim-jump-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Causes spike knockdown vs. airborne opponents; very long horizontal range on 2nd active frame, then hits far below Dhalsim (hurtbox extends outside the hitbox, making it prone to trading/losing to anti-airs); can hit as an instant overhead (but slow startup makes this incredibly risky; too slow for fuzzy overhead setups); always safe on block if performed from Yoga Float; extends a large hurtbox in front and below Dhalsim during active frames 2-4 (projectile invuln farther back, allowing Dhalsim to punish fireballs more reliably while floating at close range)

dhalsim-jump-light-kick.name: Jumping Light Kick
notes: Has cross-up attack properties
dhalsim-jump-light-kick.notes_sc: Cross-up; can be used as an instant overhead (no fuzzy setup required; works on all crouchers)

dhalsim-jump-medium-kick.name: Jumping Medium Kick
dhalsim-jump-medium-kick.notes_sc: Good horizontal range and a downward angle (very effective at stopping approaches when used out of Float); can be used as an instant overhead vs. Dee Jay/JP/Marisa/Zangief, or as a fuzzy instant overhead vs. opponents in Burnout

dhalsim-jump-heavy-kick.name: Jumping Heavy Kick
dhalsim-jump-heavy-kick.notes_sc: Great horizontal range at an upward angle for air-to-airs (especially out of Float); lower body projectile invuln 10-22f (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

yoga-uppercut.name: Yoga Uppercut
notes: An anti-air attack that can be canceled into special moves
yoga-uppercut.notes_sc: Forces stand on hit; good close-range anti-air but cannot hit cross-up; active frames 2-6 whiff on crouching opponents unless they extend a vertical hurtbox (making it a poor meaty option); all active frames are cancelable giving it a lenient hitconfirm window; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 4th active frame

yoga-lance.name: Yoga Lance
notes: A punch with long reach. Useful against opponents who jump diagonally forward
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent on counter or Punish Counter
yoga-lance.notes_sc: Whiffs on crouching opponents unless they extend a vertical hurtbox; long-range anti-air (cannot hit cross-up); Counter-hit/Punish Counter puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; canceling anti-air into a projectile can lead to juggles on CH/PC or meaty/teleport pressure

nirvana-punch.name: Nirvana Punch
notes: A damaging punch that can be canceled into special moves
nirvana-punch.notes_sc: Decent range cancelable attack, primarily used out of Drive Rush; extends a hurtbox 1f before active and hurtbox lingers 12f after recovery making it susceptible to whiff punishes

agile-kick.name: Agile Kick
notes: A quick low attack that cannot be blocked standing
Can be rapid canceled

divine-kick.name: Divine Kick
notes: A quick kick that can be canceled into special moves
divine-kick.notes_sc: Important combo tool; good meaty option due to high active frame count and safety on block

thrust-kick.name: Thrust Kick
notes: A low attack that cannot be blocked standing and can be canceled into special moves
thrust-kick.notes_sc: Acts like a standard cancelable 2MK but with below-average range; Range: 1.19; DR cancel is delayed until after active frames

yoga-mountain.name: Yoga Mountain
notes: A kick that is useful against an opponent's neutral jumps and blows the opponent back on hit
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent on counter or Punish Counter
yoga-mountain.notes_sc: Slow anti-air (cannot hit cross-up); low profile 10-13f and 33-38f; Counter-hit/Punish Counter puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state

karma-kick.name: Karma Kick
notes: A low attack that cannot be blocked standing and knocks an opponent down
Knockdown time extended when attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter
karma-kick.notes_sc: Traditional sweep; can be difficult to punish if well spaced (much better block advantage than most sweeps)

yoga-mummy.name: Yoga Mummy
notes: A special-cancelable descending attack that be performed while jumping
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent
yoga-mummy.notes_sc: Cancelable into Air Teleport or Yoga Comet until the final 6 active frames before landing; can come out on 8th airborne jump frame at the earliest; puts airborne opponent into limited juggle state; can be used after OD Yoga Flame ~ j.MP to extend the juggle into any Super after landing

drill-kick-light.name: Drill Kick (Light)
notes: A descending attack with a long duration that can be performed while jumping

drill-kick-medium.name: Drill Kick (Medium)
notes: A descending attack with a long duration that can be performed while jumping

drill-kick-heavy.name: Drill Kick (Heavy)
notes: A descending attack with a long duration that can be performed while jumping

long-sliding-kick.name: Long Sliding Kick
long-sliding-kick.name_ja: ロングスライディング
notes: Knockdown time extended when attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter
long-sliding-kick.notes_sc: Long range slide; low profile 8-39f; best version of slide for countering projectiles; has juggle potential (no longer a Hard Knockdown if juggled into)

yoga-fire-light.name: Yoga Fire (Light)
notes: Spit a ball of flame from your mouth. Useful in combos and for checking opponents from a distance

yoga-fire-light-charged.name: Yoga Fire (Light Charged)
yoga-fire-light-charged.name_ja: ヨガファイア (弱ホールド)
notes: Hold the button for 29 frames and the held button version will be performed automatically

yoga-fire-medium.name: Yoga Fire (Medium)
notes: Spit a ball of flame from your mouth. Useful in combos and for checking opponents from a distance

yoga-fire-medium-charged.name: Yoga Fire (Medium Charged)
yoga-fire-medium-charged.name_ja: ヨガファイア (中ホールド)
notes: Hold the button for 29 frames and the held button version will be performed automatically

yoga-fire-heavy.name: Yoga Fire (Heavy)
notes: Spit a ball of flame from your mouth. Useful in combos and for checking opponents from a distance

yoga-fire-heavy-charged.name: Yoga Fire (Heavy Charged)
yoga-fire-heavy-charged.name_ja: ヨガファイア (強ホールド)
notes: Hold the button for 29 frames and the held button version will be performed automatically

yoga-fire-od-light.name: Yoga Fire (Light OD)
notes: Spit a ball of flame from your mouth. Useful in combos and for checking opponents from a distance

yoga-fire-od-medium.name: Yoga Fire (Medium OD)
notes: Spit a ball of flame from your mouth. Useful in combos and for checking opponents from a distance

yoga-fire-od-heavy.name: Yoga Fire (Heavy OD)
notes: Spit a ball of flame from your mouth. Useful in combos and for checking opponents from a distance

yoga-arch-light.name: Yoga Arch (Light)
notes: Spit a curving ball of flame from your mouth. Useful for filling space above you that's usually difficult to cover

yoga-arch-medium.name: Yoga Arch (Medium)
notes: Spit a curving ball of flame from your mouth. Useful for filling space above you that's usually difficult to cover

yoga-arch-heavy.name: Yoga Arch (Heavy)
notes: Spit a curving ball of flame from your mouth. Useful for filling space above you that's usually difficult to cover

yoga-arch-od-light.name: Yoga Arch (Light OD)
notes: Spit a curving ball of flame from your mouth. Useful for filling space above you that's usually difficult to cover

yoga-arch-od-medium.name: Yoga Arch (Medium OD)
notes: Spit a curving ball of flame from your mouth. Useful for filling space above you that's usually difficult to cover

yoga-arch-od-heavy.name: Yoga Arch (Heavy OD)
notes: Spit a curving ball of flame from your mouth. Useful for filling space above you that's usually difficult to cover

yoga-flame-light.name: Yoga Flame (Light)
notes: Blow a large ball of flames from your mouth. Can be used both in combos and as a way to check your opponent while grounded

yoga-flame-medium.name: Yoga Flame (Medium)
notes: Blow a large ball of flames from your mouth. Can be used both in combos and as a way to check your opponent while grounded

yoga-flame-heavy.name: Yoga Flame (Heavy)
notes: Blow a large ball of flames from your mouth. Can be used both in combos and as a way to check your opponent while grounded

yoga-flame-od.name: Yoga Flame (OD)
notes: Blow a large ball of flames from your mouth. Can be used both in combos and as a way to check your opponent while grounded

yoga-blast-light.name: Yoga Blast (Light)
notes: Blow a large ball of flames diagonally upward. Can be used both as an early anti-air attack and in aerial combos
Clashes with projectiles

yoga-blast-medium.name: Yoga Blast (Medium)
notes: Blow a large ball of flames diagonally upward. Can be used both as an early anti-air attack and in aerial combos
Clashes with projectiles

yoga-blast-heavy.name: Yoga Blast (Heavy)
notes: Blow a large ball of flames diagonally upward. Can be used both as an early anti-air attack and in aerial combos
Clashes with projectiles

yoga-blast-od.name: Yoga Blast (OD)
notes: Blow a large ball of flames diagonally upward. Can be used both as an early anti-air attack and in aerial combos
Clashes with projectiles

yoga-comet-light.name: Yoga Comet (Light)
notes: Blow a ball of flame from mid-air aimed toward the ground. Useful as a way to check opponents from the air

yoga-comet-medium.name: Yoga Comet (Medium)
notes: Blow a ball of flame from mid-air aimed toward the ground. Useful as a way to check opponents from the air

yoga-comet-heavy.name: Yoga Comet (Heavy)
notes: Blow a ball of flame from mid-air aimed toward the ground. Useful as a way to check opponents from the air

yoga-comet-od.name: Yoga Comet (OD)
notes: Blow a ball of flame from mid-air aimed toward the ground. Useful as a way to check opponents from the air
Can perform moves from frame 50

yoga-float-immediate.name: Yoga Float (Immediate)
notes: Immediately
Rise into the air and float for a moment. Jumping attacks and aerial special moves can be used while floating
Considered airborne from frame 13
Can perform moves from frame 36

yoga-float-forward.name: Yoga Float (Forward)
notes: Rise into the air and float for a moment. Jumping attacks and aerial special moves can be used while floating
Considered airborne on frame 13
Can perform moves from frame 36

aerial-yoga-float.name: Aerial Yoga Float
notes: While airborne, transition into a float. Jumping attacks and aerial special moves can be used while floating
Can perform moves from frame 16
aerial-yoga-float.notes_sc: Can come out on 8th airborne jump frame at the earliest; can use aerial normals/specials and move left/right during float; Counter-hit state on frame 1 until landing; active time refers to airborne period in which Dhalsim can move (can input air attacks during his descent, which depends on float height; 18f at minimum height); crouching state on final landing frame; can only be used once per jump even after using OD Yoga Comet to regain air control; Movement Speed: 0.04 forward / 0.03 back

yoga-teleport-punch.name: Yoga Teleport (Punch)
yoga-teleport-punch.name_ja: ヨガテレポート (パンチ)
notes: Used to instantaneously warp set distances. Its invincibility on startup can be used to evade attacks, and can also be used to set up an offense
Completely invincible from frames 5 - 15

yoga-teleport-kick.name: Yoga Teleport (Kick)
yoga-teleport-kick.name_ja: ヨガテレポート (キック)
notes: Used to instantaneously warp set distances. Its invincibility on startup can be used to evade attacks, and can also be used to set up an offense
Completely invincible from frames 5 - 15

aerial-yoga-teleport-punch.name: Aerial Yoga Teleport (Punch)
aerial-yoga-teleport-punch.name_ja: 空中ヨガテレポート (パンチ)
notes: Used to instantaneously warp set distances while in the air. Jumping attacks and aerial special moves can be used after completing the teleport
Completely invincible from frames 10 - 15
Can perform moves from frame 30

aerial-yoga-teleport-kick.name: Aerial Yoga Teleport (Kick)
aerial-yoga-teleport-kick.name_ja: 空中ヨガテレポート (キック)
notes: Used to instantaneously warp set distances while in the air. Jumping attacks and aerial special moves can be used after completing the teleport
Completely invincible from frames 10 - 15
Can perform moves from frame 30

yoga-teleport-backward.name: Yoga Teleport (Backward)
notes: Used to instantaneously warp set distances. Its invincibility on startup can be used to evade attacks, and can also be used to set up an offense
Completely invincible from frames 5 - 15

aerial-yoga-teleport-backward-punch.name: Aerial Yoga Teleport (Backward Punch)
aerial-yoga-teleport-backward-punch.name_ja: 空中ヨガテレポート (後方パンチ)
notes: Used to instantaneously warp set distances while in the air. Jumping attacks and aerial special moves can be used after completing the teleport
Completely invincible from frames 10 - 15
Can perform moves from frame 35

aerial-yoga-teleport-backward-kick.name: Aerial Yoga Teleport (Backward Kick)
aerial-yoga-teleport-backward-kick.name_ja: 空中ヨガテレポート (後ろキック)
notes: Used to instantaneously warp set distances while in the air. Jumping attacks and aerial special moves can be used after completing the teleport
Completely invincible from frames 10 - 15
Can perform moves from frame 35

yoga-inferno-light.name: Yoga Inferno (Light)
notes: Blow flames in a variety of directions. Its quick execution makes it useful as a counterattack or as a way of converting normal attacks into combos. The direction of the flame will change depending on which button you input
Invincible to throws from frames 1 - 11
Minimum guaranteed damage is 30%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Deals 792 of recoverable damage on block

yoga-inferno-medium.name: Yoga Inferno (Medium)
notes: Blow flames in a variety of directions. Its quick execution makes it useful as a counterattack or as a way of converting normal attacks into combos. The direction of the flame will change depending on which button you input
Invincible to throws from frames 1 - 11
Minimum guaranteed damage is 30%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Deals 792 of recoverable damage on block

yoga-inferno-heavy.name: Yoga Inferno (Heavy)
notes: Blow flames in a variety of directions. Its quick execution makes it useful as a counterattack or as a way of converting normal attacks into combos. The direction of the flame will change depending on which button you input
Invincible to throws from frames 1 - 11
Minimum guaranteed damage is 30%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Deals 792 of recoverable damage on block

yoga-sunburst-lv1.name: Yoga Sunburst (Lv1)
notes: Blow an enormous mass of flames into the air which then fall to the ground. Can be used as an anti-air attack or in combos after knocking an opponent into the air
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 9
Minimum guaranteed damage is 40%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Level 1 activates if the button is released within 139 frames

yoga-sunburst-lv2.name: Yoga Sunburst (Lv2)
notes: Blow an enormous mass of flames into the air which then fall to the ground. Can be used as an anti-air attack or in combos after knocking an opponent into the air
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 9
Minimum guaranteed damage is 40%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Hold the button for over 140 frames to activate the Level 2 version

yoga-sunburst-lv3.name: Yoga Sunburst (Lv3)
notes: Blow an enormous mass of flames into the air which then fall to the ground. Can be used as an anti-air attack or in combos after knocking an opponent into the air
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 9
Minimum guaranteed damage is 40%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Hold the button for over 188 frames to activate the Level 2 version

merciless-yoga.name: Merciless Yoga
notes: When under 25% vitality
A powerful move that unleashes a series of attacks followed by a devastating headbutt. Useful in combos, as an anti-air attack, or as a way to interrupt an opponent's pressure
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 14
Minimum guaranteed damage is 50%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Can only be canceled into from special moves
merciless-yoga.notes_sc: Cinematic time regenerates ~2 Drive bars for Dhalsim; 2f startup when canceled from 63214P; *Self-hitstop does not occur until 3rd active frame on block (incorrectly appears to have 7 active frames and 20f blockstun)

merciless-yoga-ca.name: Merciless Yoga (Critical Art)
notes: A powerful move that unleashes a series of attacks followed by a devastating headbutt. Useful in combos, as an anti-air attack, or as a way to interrupt an opponent's pressure
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 14
Minimum guaranteed damage is 50%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Can only be canceled into from special moves

yoga-smash.name: Yoga Smash
notes: When near opponent
Grab and punch your opponent's head twice before sending them flying with a palm strike. Throws your opponent without switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
yoga-smash.notes_sc: Allows for a corner throw loop; walk for manual timing, dash (+6) and delay throw by 1-4f, or whiff 2LK (+5) for auto-timing; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

yoga-throw.name: Yoga Throw
notes: When near opponent
Grab your opponent with both arms and toss them behind you. Throws your opponent while switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
yoga-throw.notes_sc: Side switch; no meaty throw after throwing opponent into corner, but can meaty with 2MK (0 oB) or DR 4MK (+6 oB); a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

yoga-splash.name: Yoga Splash
notes: When near opponent
Grab an opponent's legs to disrupt their balance and send them flying. Throws your opponent without switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
yoga-splash.notes_sc: Throws opponent full screen; allows for a corner throw loop with manual timing (+10 after dash, or walk); a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously
